name: AI Client Intake with Service-Area Routing and SMS Confirmation

parameters.content:
## AI Client Intake with Service-Area Routing and SMS Confirmation

### How it works

This workflow serves a hosted intake form, normalizes the request, and checks whether the customer's state or area is one you serve. In-area requests go to Claude, which writes a personalized email and SMS confirmation plus a short summary for your team. The workflow then logs the case to Google Sheets, emails and texts the customer a confirmation, and alerts your intake team. Out-of-area requests are saved to a waitlist with a friendly response. The text message only sends when the customer opts in.

### Setup steps

- Open the Receive Intake Submission node and edit the form title, fields, and request options to match your business.
- In the Set Intake Fields node, set your business name and the comma separated list of states or areas you serve.
- Configure an HTTP Header Auth credential for Anthropic with header name x-api-key and value sk-ant-... and attach it to the Draft Confirmation node.
- Connect Gmail credentials and set the team recipient on the Alert Intake Team node.
- Connect Twilio credentials and set your sending number on the Text Customer Confirmation node.
- Connect Google Sheets credentials and replace the placeholder sheet ID on both append nodes.
- Activate the workflow and share the production form URL.

### Customization

Swap Google Sheets for a CRM, route different request types to different inboxes, adjust the served-area list or add city-level matching, change the confirmation tone in the Draft Confirmation prompt, or point the Claude node at another model by editing the URL and body.

## Receive and normalize intake

Serves a hosted intake form so you need no external form tool, then standardizes the customer's contact details, state, request type, and description for the rest of the workflow.

## Route by service area

Checks the submitted state against your served-area list and splits the flow: in-area requests continue to confirmation, out-of-area requests go to the waitlist.

## Draft confirmation with AI

Sends the request to Claude, which writes a personalized email and SMS confirmation, a one-line summary for your team, a priority, and any missing details, then parses the JSON safely.

## Log and confirm to the customer

Logs the new case to Google Sheets, alerts your intake team by email, and emails the customer their confirmation and reference number.

## Text and respond

If the customer opted in to texts, sends the SMS confirmation through Twilio, then shows the customer a confirmation page.

## Handle out-of-area requests

Saves out-of-area requests to a waitlist tab and shows a friendly message letting the customer know you will reach out when you expand.

values.fieldLabel: What do you need help with?
Can we text you updates about your request?

parameters.formDescription: Tell us what you need and we will confirm right away. For State, use the two letter code, for example FL.

assignments.name: smsConsent
assignments.value: ={{ ($json['Can we text you updates about your request?'] || 'No').toString().trim() }}

parameters.message:
=

New client intake

Reference: {{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.caseRef }}
Priority: {{ $('Parse AI Response').item.json.priority }}
Request type: {{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.requestType }}
State: {{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.state }}

{{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.fullName }}
{{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.email }}{{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.phone ? ' · ' + $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.phone : '' }}

Summary: {{ $('Parse AI Response').item.json.internal_summary }}

Their description:

{{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.details }}

{{ $('Parse AI Response').item.json.missing_info ? '

Still needed: ' + $('Parse AI Response').item.json.missing_info + '

' : '' }}
parameters.subject: =New intake: {{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.requestType }} ({{ $('Parse AI Response').item.json.priority }}) - {{ $('Set Intake Fields').item.json.fullName }}

parameters.completionTitle: Thank you, we have your request
parameters.completionMessage: We just sent a confirmation to your email with your reference number. If you opted in to texts, you will also get a message shortly. Our team will follow up soon.
We are not serving your area just yet. We have added you to our list and will reach out as soon as we expand to your area.
